Sec.3.4.1(L)  
 
 
 
 
 
  
                     6th November 2023 
 
The Secretary, 
BSE Ltd., 
Phiroze Jeejeebhoy Towers, 
Dalal Street, 
Mumbai 400 001 
BSE Scrip Code: 500547 
The Secretary, 
National Stock Exchange of India Ltd., 
Exchange Plaza, Plot No C/1,  
G Block, Bandra-Kurla Complex, 
Mumbai 400051 
NSE Symbol : BPCL 
Dear Sir/Madam, 
 
Sub: Transcripts of Conference Call 
 
In continuation of our letter dated 30th October 2023, we give below the link of Transcripts of 
Conference Call held on Monday, 30th October 2023, in respect of Unaudited Financial Results for 
the quarter and half year ended 30th September, 2023. 
 
https://www.bharatpetroleum.in/bharat-petroleum-for/investors/shareholders-information/conference-
call-recording.aspx  
 
 
Thanking You, 
Yours faithfully, 
For Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited 
 
(V. Kala) 
Company Secretary
